mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_search_rebuild SET rebuild_status = #{rebuildStatus}, index_name = #{indexName}, total_count = #{totalCount}, processed_count = 0, last_ticket_id = 0, start_event_id = #{startEventId}, max_ticket_id = #{maxTicketId}, error_message = NULL, started_at = #{startedAt}, ended_at = NULL, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE rebuild_id = 1 AND rebuild_status != 'RUNNING'
mapper.select: SELECT rebuild_id, rebuild_status, index_name, total_count, processed_count, last_ticket_id, start_event_id, max_ticket_id, error_message, started_at, ended_at, update_time FROM ticket_search_rebuild WHERE rebuild_id = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_search_rebuild SET processed_count = #{processedCount}, last_ticket_id = #{lastTicketId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE rebuild_id = 1 AND rebuild_status = 'RUNNING'
UPDATE ticket_search_rebuild SET rebuild_status = 'SUCCEEDED', processed_count = #{processedCount}, ended_at = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE rebuild_id = 1 AND rebuild_status = 'RUNNING'
UPDATE ticket_search_rebuild SET rebuild_status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, ended_at = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE rebuild_id = 1 AND rebuild_status = 'RUNNING'
